programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.desc: Dr. Crockett is visited by two New Orleans detectives who have questions about his past; Dr. Choi puts his life in danger to save a child; Dr. Charles gives fatherly advice to his young daughter.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: When Did We Begin to Change
programs.desc: The staff adjusts to the new normal of the pandemic; Dr. Choi, Dr. Lanik and April fight on the front lines; Dr. Halstead and Hannah face a troubling reality; Dr. Charles tries to clear the air with his daughter following recent developments.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: Those Things Hidden in Plain Sight
programs.desc: Goodwin announces a new ED Chief, and the choice doesn't make everyone happy; Dr. Manning takes a stand for her patient and finds herself dealing with the repercussions; Dr. Charles tends to family affairs.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: Do You Know the Way Home?
programs.desc: Dr. Charles and April team up to take on a mysterious patient in the ED; Dr. Halstead is forced to make a life-or-death decision for one of his trial patients; Dr. Marcel is confronted by his past when a former acquaintance is brought into the ED.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.desc: Dr. Manning and Dr. Charles assist in a complicated case helping a child who is no stranger to the ED; Dr. Marcel and Dr. Choi tend to a police officer with a mysterious gunshot wound; relationships are put to the test as secrets are revealed.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.desc: Dr. Charles and Goodwin fear Dr. Halstead is repeating his past mistakes when a patient with early onset Alzheimer's is brought into the E.D.; Maggie and Ben are concerned when one of Ben's students is admitted; Dr. Manning and Dr. Marcel disagree.
